film.title: Cedar Rapids
film.overview: A naive Midwesterner insurance salesman travels to a big-city convention in an effort to save the jobs of his co-workers.

dialogues.dialogue: in the Tiffany Suite,  and we engaged in a filthy act  of which I am totally ashamed.  I let Orin inside of me,  where he tainted the most sacred and special part of me.
dialogues.cause_raw: engaging in a sexual act the speaker regrets

dialogues.dialogue: Four years!  How do you it, Roger?  So proud of you, Roggie. Mmm... Hey, Roger.  Hey, Roger.  Tim Lippe! I didn't even see you there.
Look, I might be a lot of things,  but a poacher ain't one of them.  And I'm proud of that.  You saw this petition?  Yeah, I saw it. I didn't sign it.
What are you talking about?  This is a no go.  This is a no go.  I'm proud of you, Tim.  That was the right thing to do.  Lippe, you freaking goofy b*****d.
